articles.title: US SEC approves Bitwise’s combined Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF
articles.description: The SEC approved a filing from NYSE Arca to list and trade shares for Bitwise's combined bitcoin and Ethereum exchange-traded fund.

articles.title: SEC Edges Closer to Decision on Canary Capital’s Litecoin ETF
articles.description: The agency has called for the public’s comments on the proposed ETF before it approves or denies it.

articles.title: Pump.fun Deposits $407,000,000 Worth of Solana (SOL) to Kraken in Last Year: Lookonchain
articles.description: The controversial Solana-based memecoin launchpad Pump.fun has deposited $407 million worth of SOL into the crypto exchange Kraken in the past year, according to the digital asset tracker Lookonchain. Lookonchain also notes that Pump.fun, which launched in January 2024, sold 264,373 SOL for $41.64 million worth of the stablecoin USDC. The memecoin launchpad has reportedly […] The post Pump.fun...

articles.title: Ross Ulbricht-linked crypto wallets appear to shed $12 million in value on Pump.fun: Arkham
articles.description: Someone with access to Ulbricht's wallets accidentally nuked the price of a Pump.fun coin sent to him, according to Arkham.

articles.title: Kraken Reintroduces Staking for U.S. Customers in 39 States After SEC Settlement
articles.description: Kraken, a major cryptocurrency exchange, has reintroduced on-chain staking services for its US clients

articles.title: Trump Launches Official Watches—Pay with Bitcoin or $TRUMP
articles.description: His official watches are now available for purchase on his website. Buyers can pay with Bitcoin or the $TRUMP token via Solana Pay. Trump Accepts Bitcoin and $TRUMP for Watches In a move that blends traditional luxury with cutting-edge finance, Trump’s website now accepts Bitcoin and the $TRUMP token as payment options. Solana Pay ensures […] The post Trump Launches Official Watches—Pay with...

articles.title: Indiana Moves to Allow Bitcoin in Pension Funds as States Eye Crypto Reserves
articles.description: Indiana is taking steps toward integrating Bitcoin into state-managed retirement funds with a new legislative proposal. The post Indiana Moves to Allow Bitcoin in Pension Funds as States Eye Crypto Reserves appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Trump and Melania memecoins make push for real-world payments in fragrances, sneakers and travel
articles.description: Official Trump and Melania memecoins are now being accepted for payment on some Trump-branded product websites via a Solana Pay integration.

articles.title: Former SEC & CFTC Economists Back Solana - Is a U.S. ETF Next?
articles.description: Solana ETF approvals could see TradFi giants acquire $6. 7B worth of $SOL.

articles.title: Illinois and Indiana Push for Bitcoin Reserves in New Bills
articles.description: Illinois and Indiana introduce bills to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, aiming to boost investment, hedge inflation, and explore blockchain technology.

articles.title: Trump’s Order Sparks Bitcoin Boom: $200K Prediction for 2025
articles.description: Trump’s executive order fuels $1.9B in crypto inflows, reshaping Bitcoin’s cycle and paving the way for a potential $200K price surge in 2025.

articles.title: Sonic Now ‘Golden Standard’ of Layer-2s After Scaling Transactions to 16,000+ per Second, Says Andre Cronje
articles.description: The newly rebranded layer-1 blockchain Sonic (S) is being called the “golden standard” of layer-2s (L2s) by Andre Cronje, the project’s co-founder. Cronje claims on the social media platform X that Sonic, formerly known as Fantom, is the “only actual decentralized stage 3 L2.” “No fee extraction, all submits 100% to ETH, no ‘centralized value […] The post Sonic Now ‘Golden Standard’ of...
